posts.angle: better ad tooling still needs cleaner billing and payment control
posts.hook: Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.
posts.copy:
Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.

We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments. Teams move faster when payment setup does not slow subscriptions, ads, or cross-border checkout.

RichXPay supports use case page for funding a virtual card with usdt or usdc for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
sourceTitles: We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments.
Albertsons Media Collective brings retail signals to YouTube with Google’s Commerce Media Suite.
posts.landingSummary: Use case page for funding a virtual card with USDT or USDC for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
